issues.description: DrawCard action has fixed count of 3, but the effect text says 'Draw card(s) so that you have 3 cards in your hand' which means draw up to 3 cards (variable amount based on current hand size). This is a conditional draw to reach exactly 3 cards, not a fixed draw of 3 cards.
PlayFromHand action is missing the 'upTo' field set to 1, as the text says 'play up to 1' which makes it optional.
